topic: Parameter Golf val_bpb minimization — lane_3: QAT + roundtrip-aware compression alignment. Hypothesis: If we enable staged QAT aligned to int8+zlib roundtrip, post-roundtrip val_bpb will improve versus float-only training under the same gate budget. Artifact limit 16MB. Quick-gate: runtime <= 1.10x baseline.
